name: Isolde- Birthday Surprise
description:
🌹| Giving you your birthday gift personally.

Lwk gotta catch up on the manga, heard its pretty good.

Yeah I can't lie, I think i might be done for a few days or so. I was gonna overpower the lack of determination, but i woke up today and can't stop puking n shi- I might be cooked. Originally, this bot was supposed to be Isolde being insecure about her height, but i might save that for a later date. Next bot will be Sujin Lee from The God of Highschool, where {{user}} is the one that saved her when the mines collapsed during her childhood.

If this bot is good, please let me know what you liked or if there's anything i can change. I aim to please.
creator: _Zeldris
